Meet the Treasure Master

Auntie Gale's Story

I've been hunting treasures for 30 years—first for myself, then for everyone. What started as weekend garage sale runs became a mission: prove that the best stuff isn't sold in big-box stores. It's sitting in someone's attic, waiting for YOU.

Every item on my lot has been tested, loved, and priced fair. No junk, no guesses. Just honest deals on things that matter.

Read My Full Story →
Happy Customers

Real People, Real Deals

★★★★★

"Found a set of cast iron pans for $12. My daughter thought I was crazy stopping — I proved her wrong the moment we got home!"

— Maureen T., Lakewood
★★★★★

"Gale knows her stuff! She told me the lamp I was eyeing was a genuine McCoy piece. Got it for $18. Listed for $140 at the antique mall."

— Dennis R., Denver
★★★★★

"I've been shopping with Auntie Gale for 3 years. She tests everything before selling it. You know exactly what you're getting."

— Sarah K., Aurora
